meta.title: Francisco Vela | Professional Football Fitness Coach
meta.description: Francisco Javier Vela Terrero, Fitness Coach with over 10 years of experience in professional football. Degree in Physical Activity and Sports Science, Masters in Fitness Coaching and Injury Prevention, UEFA PRO.
meta.keywords: football fitness coach, Francisco Vela, fitness coach Spain, professional football, injury prevention, GPS football

hero.subtitle: Performance optimization, injury prevention and development of each athlete's maximum potential.

bio.text: Francisco Javier Vela Terrero holds a Degree in Physical Activity and Sports Science, a Master's in Football Fitness Coaching, and a Master's in Injury Prevention and Readaptation, along with a UEFA PRO coaching licence. A professional football fitness coach for over a decade, he currently serves as fitness coach at Chiclana CF (Spain). His career is marked by solid national experience in professional football, having led the physical preparation of clubs including San Fernando CF, Cádiz CF and AD Llerenense.

timeline.desc: Professional football debut — San Fernando CD
Promoted to reserve team — Cádiz CF Balón

methodology.text: We work on every aspect that impacts performance to develop stronger, faster and more resilient athletes.

cta_banner.subtitle: Let's talk about how I can help you or your team reach maximum potential.

trajectory.meta_description: Discover Francisco Vela's professional career as a fitness coach at San Fernando CD, Cádiz CF, AD Llerenense and Chiclana CF.
trajectory.bio_text_1: Francisco Javier Vela Terrero (Cádiz, 18th June 1998). He holds a Degree in Physical Activity and Sports Science (2020). In 2021 he completed the Master's in Football Fitness Coaching and in 2022 the Master's in Injury Prevention and Readaptation in Football, both awarded by the University of Castilla La Mancha, the Association of Fitness Coaches and the Royal Madrid Football Federation. In 2025 he completed the Higher Level in Football Sports Coaching (UEFA PRO), as well as an Expert Course in Training Load Control and Quantification in Football, taught by Marcos Chena and Antonio Sánchez.
trajectory.bio_text_2: He began his professional career at San Fernando CD as fitness coach for the U19 team in the National League in 2018. After one season, he moved to Cádiz CF to lead the physical preparation of the U19 team, where he remained for two seasons. This work earned him promotion in July 2021 to the U23 reserve team in 1ª RFAF, where he spent 3 seasons working with coach Jesuli Velazquez, achieving 3 promotion playoffs and two consecutive promotions, the last to División de Honor Senior.
trajectory.bio_text_3: During 2022 and 2023 he also worked as a coach for LA LIGA's International Campus. In his final year at Cádiz CF he was assistant coach for the U19 International Academy under Pablo Sanchez. In June 2024 he joined coach Juan Garcia in Extremadura as fitness coach for AD Llerenense in Tercera RFEF, reaching the promotion playoff final for Segunda RFEF. In June 2026 he started a new chapter with coach Jose Manuel Perez Herrera at Chiclana CF in Tercera RFEF. In summary, Fran Vela has accumulated a decade of uninterrupted experience in professional football teams, distinguished by his ability to apply scientific knowledge in a sports context.

education.meta_description: Francisco Vela's academic background and teaching experience: Degree in Physical Activity, Masters in Fitness Coaching and Injury Prevention, UEFA PRO.
education.teaching_intro: Fran Vela has over 5 years of teaching experience. He is a regular collaborator in Masters and Expert Courses on Football Fitness Coaching at national and international level. Fran also frequently participates as a speaker at international courses and congresses, both in person and online (Spanish and English).

interviews.meta_description: Media interviews and appearances by Francisco Vela, professional football fitness coach.

coaching.meta_description: Personalised training programme with Francisco Vela. Evidence-based methodology for amateur, semi-professional and professional footballers.
coaching.hero_text: Maintaining a high level of physical fitness and reducing the risk of injury are key aspects of achieving optimal sports performance throughout the season. If you are looking to optimise your physical condition, Fran can offer you tools adapted to your needs and work contexts, backed by his 10 years of experience as a professional football fitness coach and his ongoing training in sports performance.

method_steps.title: ASSESS
method_steps.text: Designing sessions without a prior assessment is one of the most common mistakes. We will assess your physical condition to identify areas for improvement and potential deficits.

method_steps.title: PLAN
method_steps.text: Prescribe individually and precisely to maximise adaptations and minimise risks.

method_steps.title: MONITOR
method_steps.text: Quantify and control training load to detect fatigue and optimise performance.

method_steps.title: DECIDE
method_steps.text: Real feedback, daily tracking with the player in real time.

programs.title: Transitional Period (Summer)
programs.text: Face your pre-season with a solid fitness base to train safely, recover better between demanding matches and reach optimal intensity in pre-season games.

programs.title: Transitional Period (Winter)
programs.text: Maintaining fitness levels during the Christmas break is key to not losing physiological adaptations ahead of the second half of the season.

programs.title: During the Season
programs.text: Complementary training adapted to your material resources, designed based on your individual characteristics and records. It complements your professional team's daily routines.

programs.title: New Sports Project
programs.text: Get ready for when the time comes to join a new project. Build a robust physical condition; the programme adapts to the needs, resources and objectives of the athlete.

coaching.cta_text: If you want to know more about the training programme in detail, contact me.

contact.meta_description: Contact Francisco Vela, professional football fitness coach.
contact.subtitle: If you want to improve your team's performance or need more information, I am here to help you.
contact.form_success: Message sent! I will get back to you soon.
contact.form_error: There was an error. Please try again.

testimonials.name: Marcos Chena
testimonials.text: I have had the opportunity to closely follow Fran's professional development and I can highlight his constant commitment to learning, continuous improvement and professional growth. He is a young fitness coach with a great ability to adapt to different work contexts, a solid foundation in monitoring and load analysis using GPS technology, and an excellent willingness to work as part of a team. Beyond his knowledge, he stands out for his approachability, his ability to build trust with players, and for contributing to a positive work environment.
testimonials.highlight: I am convinced he will continue to grow as a professional and bring great value to the projects he takes part in.

testimonials.name: Jesuli Velazquez
testimonials.text: Francisco Vela is a fitness coach who stands out for his enormous capacity for work, commitment and daily dedication. He is a true hard worker, always willing to keep learning and give his best.
testimonials.highlight: His professionalism, seriousness and human quality make him a person who can be fully trusted.

testimonials.name: Juan Garcia
testimonials.text: Working with Fran was always easy — great attitude, a willingness to engage in dialogue, and decision-making always backed by solid arguments thanks to his education.
testimonials.highlight: A professional with a tremendous future.

testimonials.name: Dani Romera
testimonials.text: Working with Fran has been key to my development as a footballer.
testimonials.highlight: His individual follow-up and the way he adapts training to my needs makes all the difference.

testimonials.name: Jose Manuel Perez Herrera
testimonials.text: A committed professional, rigorous in his methodology and with excellent adaptability.
testimonials.highlight: His contribution to the coaching staff is fundamental to the team's performance.

testimonials.name: Pablo Grande
testimonials.text: I had the opportunity to work with Fran at the Cádiz CF International Academy.
testimonials.highlight: His level of preparation and willingness to work as a team are exceptional.

testimonials.name: Sergio Dorado
testimonials.text: A colleague with whom I have had the pleasure of sharing experiences.
testimonials.highlight: His knowledge, rigour and passion for fitness coaching are a benchmark in the sector.
